name: flowsense
description: Local-first desktop productivity assistant that discovers repetitive workflows automatically.

scripts.build: npm -w @flowsense/shared run build && npm -w @flowsense/desktop run build && npm -w @flowsense/backend run build && npm -w @flowsense/extension run build
scripts.test: npm -w @flowsense/backend run test && npm -w @flowsense/desktop run test
scripts.lint: npm -w @flowsense/desktop run lint && npm -w @flowsense/backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @flowsense/shared run typecheck && npm -w @flowsense/desktop run typecheck
